blocks.en: Let's trace one message from an app to the air and back. Each layer adds what the next one needs, like nested envelopes.
blocks.zh: 让我们追踪一条消息：从应用程序到空口再返回。每一层都为下一层加上所需的东西，像一层层套叠的信封。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App
  participant MAC
  participant PHY
  participant AP
  App->>MAC: data (MSDU)
  MAC->>PHY: framed bytes + addresses
  PHY->>AP: radio symbols over the air
  AP-->>PHY: ACK symbols
  PHY-->>MAC: ACK
  MAC-->>App: delivered
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App as 应用
  participant MAC
  participant PHY as 物理层 PHY
  participant AP
  App->>MAC: 数据 (MSDU)
  MAC->>PHY: 成帧字节 + 地址
  PHY->>AP: 无线符号经由空口
  AP-->>PHY: ACK 符号
  PHY-->>MAC: ACK
  MAC-->>App: 已送达

blocks.en: The MAC decides who talks and writes the addresses; the PHY turns bytes into radio symbols and back. The two upcoming tracks dig into each.
blocks.zh: MAC 决定谁来发送并写入地址；PHY 把字节变成无线符号、再变回来。接下来的两个轨道将分别深入。

q.en: Which layer turns bytes into radio symbols?
q.zh: 哪一层把字节变成无线符号？
